name: Price Tracker
description: Track prices on products and get notified of drops

agents.name: Price Checker
agents.purpose: Check current prices on specified products
agents.system_prompt_hint: Fetch the product page and extract the current price. Note any sale prices, coupon codes, or availability changes.

agents.name: Deal Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze price history and determine if it's a good deal
agents.system_prompt_hint: Compare the current price with previously saved prices. Report price changes, trends, and whether now is a good time to buy.

suggestion_card.title: Price Tracker
suggestion_card.subtitle: Track product prices and find deals

author: agentfactory
